lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane real config+wiring fix; scenarios drive the fail-loud + populate config-key proof.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: report.md '## Test Evidence': the new required key DRIVE_PROVIDER_GOOGLE_HTTP_RESPONSE_HEADER_TIMEOUT_SECONDS is enforced fail-loud by TestDriveConfigValidationRequiresEverySSTField and round-trips via TestDriveConfigPopulatesEveryField; ./smackerel.sh config generate resolves it end-to-end.

scenarios.title: Missing/empty drive google response-header timeout fails loud naming the env var
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: With DRIVE_PROVIDER_GOOGLE_HTTP_RESPONSE_HEADER_TIMEOUT_SECONDS empty, Load() returns an error naming that env var (fail-loud, no default).

scenarios.title: Response-header timeout round-trips into the typed Google provider config
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: cfg.Drive.Providers.Google.HTTPResponseHeaderTimeoutSeconds == 30 after Load() with the dev fixture env.
